name: AREthAddEventToEventgroup
title: AREthAddEventToEventgroup
syntax: LONG AREthAddEventToEventgroup( dword pevgHandle, dword pevHandle );
description: This function assigns an Event which was created by AREthAddEvent to an Event Group which was created by AREthAddProvidedEventGroup.
The Event can be removed from the Event Group with AREthRemoveEventFromEventGroup.

parameters.name: pevgHandle
parameters.description: Handle of the Event Group that should be assigned to an Event, see AREthAddProvidedEventGroup

parameters.name: pevHandle
parameters.description: Handle of the Event that should be assigned to the Event Group, see AREthAddEvent

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
